## Summary

Provide a concise description of what this PR changes and why.

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor (code improvement, no behavior change)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] chore/ci/build

---

## Scope

- [ ] `apps/web`
- [ ] `packages/shared`
- [ ] `packages/ui`
- [ ] `packages/config`
- [ ] `packages/database`
- [ ] repo tooling/config

---

## Validation

Commands run:

```bash
pnpm format
pnpm lint
pnpm build
```

Results:

- [ ] Formatting passes
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Build passes

---

## Screenshots / Recordings (if UI)

Attach before/after screenshots or short recordings.

---

## Database / Migration Impact

- [ ] No DB changes
- [ ] DB changes included

If DB changes exist, describe migration strategy and rollback plan.

---

## Risk & Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback strategy:

---

## Additional Notes

Add reviewer context, known trade-offs, or follow-up tasks.
